calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff?S Initial Responses To Defendants? Form Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set One), Request For Production Of Documents (Set One), And For Monetary Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Sections 2023.090(C) And 2031.300(C)
Off Calendar Jun-03-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS RICHARD PATRICK MURPHY AND ELIZABETH MURPHY'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S INITIAL RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS' FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE), AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS PURSUANT TO CCP SECTIONS 2023.090(C) AND 2031.300(C)

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to compel plaintiff Dariush Djavaheri to respond to defendants' Form Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set One), and Request for Production of Documents (Set One) is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. Plaintiff has failed to respond and has thereby waived objections. Plaintiff shall provide complete, verified, objection-free responses within three weeks. The court further awards sanctions, concluding that Plaintiff's failure to respond to discovery lacks substantial justification. Plaintiff shall pay $1,006.00 to Defendants within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Justin Renge, Esq., B&D Law Group, APLC 310-424-5252 Attorney for Plaintiff Dariush Djavaheri

No other appearances.

Hearing held. Discussed, not ARGUED. Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DARIUSH DJAVAHERI MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is granted.

Court will sign the submitted proposed order.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
